name: Data Analysis Workflow
description: Load, validate, analyse, and summarise a dataset, producing insights and visualisation recommendations

inputs.name: data_source
inputs.description: Path or description of the dataset (CSV, JSON, database query, or API endpoint)

inputs.name: analysis_goal
inputs.description: What question or business problem the analysis should answer

inputs.name: key_dimensions
inputs.description: Columns or variables of primary interest for segmentation or grouping

inputs.name: output_format
inputs.description: Desired output: summary table, narrative report, or both

outputs.name: data_quality_report
outputs.description: Summary of missing values, outliers, and data quality issues found

outputs.name: insights_summary
outputs.description: Key findings and patterns discovered in the data, written in plain language

outputs.name: statistical_summary
outputs.description: Descriptive statistics for key variables (count, mean, median, std, min, max)

outputs.name: visualisation_recommendations
outputs.description: Suggested chart types and axes for visualising the most important findings

steps: Confirm the data source, analysis goal, and key dimensions with the user
Load and inspect the dataset: record count, column names, data types, and a sample of rows
Assess data quality: missing values, duplicates, outliers, and inconsistent formatting

then: Report the issues to the user and propose cleaning steps
Apply the approved cleaning steps and confirm the cleaned record count
else: Proceed with analysis on the raw data and note the quality caveats in the output

steps: Compute descriptive statistics for all numeric columns and value distributions for categorical columns

then: Segment the data by each dimension and compute group-level statistics
Identify the top three highest and lowest performing segments

steps: Identify the most significant patterns, trends, or anomalies relevant to the analysis goal
Draft the insights summary in plain language, connecting findings back to the stated business question
Recommend suitable visualisation types for the top findings (e.g. bar chart for category comparison, line chart for trends)
Present the full analysis output to the user for review
